name: De Grey Mining Limited
description: De Grey Mining Limited is an Australian-based gold explorer and developer focused on the Pilbara region of Western Australia. The company's primary asset is the Mallina Gold Project, which hosts the world-class Hemi discovery. De Grey is dedicated to advancing Hemi through the definitive feasibility study stage and into production, aiming to establish a large-scale, low-cost gold mining operation. With a significant landholding in a Tier 1 mining jurisdiction, the company continues to explore and expand its resource base while maintaining a commitment to sustainable development and community engagement.
